bulk_renew_confirm: Renew {{count}} selected subscriptions? Unconfirmed renewal drafts will be created.

renewal_reason.open_ended: open-ended (no end date to renew from)
renewal_reason.no_variation: no matching variation covers the new term
renewal_reason.no_price: no price configured for the new term
renewal_reason.dsd_coverage: delivery station/day doesn't reach the new term

debits_period_month_help: Month whose due charges will be bundled into this run (period = whole month).
debits_collection_date_help: Date the bank collects the money (RequestedCollectionDate). At least 1 banking day in the future (FRST: 5 days).
debits_export_confirm: Export this run? Charges become ISSUED and can no longer be edited.
debits_run_exported: Run exported. pain.008 XML is now available for download — upload it directly to your bank's portal.
charges_regenerate_confirm: Re-run the schedule generator for every active subscription? Idempotent — only PLANNED rows are affected.
charges_regenerated: Regeneration done. {{subscriptions}} subscription(s), {{rows}} new PLANNED rows.
offer_sent: The member has been notified that a spot is available.
offer_variation_full: The share type just filled up — no spot to offer.
offer_station_full: The delivery station just filled up — no spot to offer.

offer_page.title: Hi {{name}}, a spot is available
offer_page.intro: A place has opened up for the subscription you're on the waiting list for. Would you like to take it?
offer_page.accepted_text: Thanks — your subscription has been reserved. The office will confirm it shortly.
offer_page.declined_text: The spot has been released for the next person on the list.
offer_page.expired_text: The reply window has passed. Please contact the office if you're still interested.
offer_page.invalid_title: This link is no longer valid
offer_page.invalid_text: The offer may have already been answered or withdrawn. Please contact the office.
offer_page.error_text: We couldn't process your response. Please try again or contact the office.

waiting_list_notice: The chosen delivery station is full for the selected period. The subscription joins the waiting list and only becomes active once the office confirms a freed-up spot.
waiting_list_notice_variation: This share type is sold out. The subscription joins the waiting list and only becomes active once the office confirms a freed-up spot.
subscription_waiting_listed: Subscription added to the waiting list
waiting_listed_variation_full: Share type sold out — the subscription was added to the waiting list.
waiting_listed_station_full: Delivery station full — the subscription was added to the waiting list.
waiting_list_offer_text: The delivery station is full for the chosen period. Put the subscription on the waiting list instead?
waiting_list_offer_text_variation: This share type is sold out for the chosen period. Put the subscription on the waiting list instead?
solidarity_pricing_tooltip: With solidarity pricing you choose your own contribution – at least the lower limit. The reference price is the recommended amount that covers the costs; those who give more balance out those who pay less.
valid_until_season_hint: Automatically ends at the end of the season.
valid_until_year_hint: Automatically ends one year after the start.
is_trial_hint_nodate: Trial — the end date comes from the settings.
capacity_out_of_window: The selected range is outside the loaded capacity window — capacities for it weren't fetched.
public_sepa_mandate_hint: For security, you'll set up your SEPA mandate later — after activating your account, in your member area.
sepa_mandate_required: Please set up a valid SEPA mandate first.
sepa_mandate_missing: This member has no valid SEPA mandate yet. Please set one up before saving the subscription.
